translations: will not be tested will not be tested
puzzle.hint: A verse about reliance on Allah (tawakkul) and His promise to support those who turn to Him in faith
puzzle.arabic: أَحَسِبَ ٱلنَّاسُ أَن يُتْرَكُوٓا۟ أَن يَقُولُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا وَهُمْ لَا يُفْتَنُونَ
puzzle.verseEn: Do the people think that they will be left to say, "We believe" and they will not be tried?
